entry.title: BUDGET AUTORIZATIONS IN SAP B1
entry.content:
Good morning esteemed experts,

Is there a place where I can consult to view the query for condition 5=Deviation from Budget for authorization models? I would like to see the generation of a query to establish ranges in the same way that the authorization model does natively from the table WTM4. An inconsistency has been detected, and I want to validate if it is possible to visualize it. In this case, the deviation calculates, for example, all purchase orders, and I want to make the connection. Is it possible to see that native query?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One SLD Error
entry.content: Have you tried restarting the SAP B1 services?

entry.title: FAGLF101 Not Posting Journal Entry – Empty Posting List
entry.content:
Hi FI Experts,

I am facing an issue with FAGLF101 where the Posting List remains empty, and no journal entry documents are being generated. I've already checked the following:

  • Configuration settings in OBBU, OBBV, OBBW, and OBBX
  • Sort Method and Account Determination for receivables and payables
  • Message Log while executing with "Generate Posting"
  • Technical Adjustment Accounts (not reconciliation accounts)
  • Period Open Status for reversal postings

Despite these checks, the system is still not generating any postings. Has anyone encountered this before, and is there a specific setting or step I might have missed?

Any insights or troubleshooting tips would be greatly appreciated!

Let me know if you'd like me to refine this further.

Hope you get the solution soon!

entry.title: Re: Multiple Drafts in RAP with Optimistic Merge
entry.content: Thanks, as discussed via other channel, we will try to leverage this new feature offered by RAP framework.

entry.title: Update custom fields of portfolio item using FM /RPM/ITEM_MODIFY
entry.content:
I have a requirement to add few custom fields in table /RPM/ITEM_D and update them using upload program RPM_DX_ITEM.

I checked the program and noticed that item creation is happening by calling FM /RPM/ITEM_MODIFY.

Is there a way to utilize this FM to update custom fields in portfolio item?

TIA

entry.title: New READ TABLE Syntax Results in SY-SUBRC = 4 – Why Is It Not Recognized?
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I recently encountered an issue while using the new syntax for READ TABLE in ABAP. Here's what I tried :

gs_lips = value #( lt_lips_zwm[ vbeln = <fs_zwm>-ordnum posnr = <fs_zwm>-ordlin ] optional ).

However, SY-SUBRC is returning 4, even though I’m certain the entry exists in the internal table .After cross-checking everything, I tried the old syntax : 

read table lt_lips_zwm into gs_lips with key vbeln = <fs_zwm>-ordnum posnr = <fs_zwm>-ordlin binary search.

And it works as expected SY-SUBRC returns 0. I'm puzzled why the new syntax doesn't recognize the entry. Has anyone else faced this issue? Is there something I'm missing.

Thanks, 

JF

entry.title: Handover of test cases to test from one user to another user CALM
entry.content:
Dear,

The creation of a test case and link to a test plan and execute is clear, only to have in really practice is different, hopefully someone will able to give us more clarity on the below. We are going to start with the test execution and have created multiple test cases, we have now questions regrading test execution and test plans. Any suggestion are welcome:

  1. When creating a test case we have the possibility to create a test plan and link the test case to these test plan, but when linking multiple test case to a test plan we cannot define the order/sequence of the test cases.
  2. We have only the possibility to add one tester in the test plan? What if I have more testers to test on one teste case ?
  3. If we assign a tester does he receive any e-mail? 
  4. Is there any e-mail chain/notification regarding test management except defects?
  5. How can we handover a certain test case/execution to another (does he also receive an e-mail) ?  

Kind Regards,

Rayane

entry.title: Re: How to debug data migrations in the Migration Cockpit?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

Just to emphasize: although the KBA 2752050 mentions the debugging of data simulations, its exact resolution steps can be followed to debug data migrations too, which is why it is applicable here.

In such case, after preparing the system's environment to debug the necessary activities, the migration should be started in the Migration Cockpit to trigger the maintained breakpoints (and troubleshoot the conversion or posting performed).

Best regards,
Caio

entry.title: Unassigned test cases in Cloud ALM test execution
entry.content:
Hello experts,
 
I am relatively new in the SAP world, more particularly in SAP Cloud ALM.
 
I am currently working in a migration project, from an ECC to S4H, and we are using the SAP Cloud ALM tool for test management. This implies: test case preparation, test plan preparation, test case executions and monitoring.
 
While the construction of test cases and plans has worked accordingly, I have been facing an issue that I'd like to find an answer to (in order to avoid these situations in the future) and that I will be complimenting with screenshots (from DEMO system) provided.
 
For some context,
 
1. Test preparation (Screenshot: 1. Test preparation)
I have created 3 test cases as shown, with status set to "Prepared".
 
2. Test plans (Screenshots: 1. Test plan & 2. Test plan)
I have also created 1 test plan to which I have assigned the 3 previously created test cases and, to each one of them a tester; test plan's status is set to "In testing".

 

 

3. Test execution (Screenshots: 1. Test execution, 2. Test execution & 3. Test execution)
When visualizing the aplication "Test execution" I observe: Instead of having a list consisting of 3 test cases pending for execution (those which have been assigned to the test plan), we have a list of 6. Out of these 6, 3 of them are shown with no test plan nor tester assigned to them (Highlighted as "None" or empty) meanwhile, on the contrary, the rest, show, indeed, a test plan and a tester assigned to them, which is what we want.

 

 

 

4. Overview (Screenshots: 1. Overview & 2. Overview)
When visualizing the overview app for testing, I have to set a filter in "Test plans" in order to rule out those test cases without assignment, so we can maintain an effective monitoring of test executions.

 

 

What can I do, or undo, experts, in order to avoid this situation in the future and so the quantity of test executions corresponds solely to those that have been assigned a test plan and a tester?
 
Thank in advance,
 
Sebastián

entry.title: Re: Learning Hub Partner Edition - Four attempts for cert...
entry.content: Thanks for you input Arun! Much Appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Learning Hub Partner Edition - Four attempts for cert...
entry.content:
Hi Margit!

Thank you for clarifying my question! Now it's clear.

Kind regards!

entry.title: Clean core _Is appending fixed domain values to standard domains clean core compliant?
entry.content:
Hello Expert

In S/4HANA Cloud, it is technically possible to add fixed domain values by appending to a standard SAP domain using the domain append functionality (via SE11).

Before proceeding, I would like to understand:

  • Is adding fixed domain values by appending to a standard domain considered a violation of SAP’s clean core principles?

  • Will these appended values be retained during future system upgrades, or is there a risk they could be overwritten or lost?

  • What is the clean core-compliant alternative to extend or enhance domain values without modifying or appending to standard SAP domains?

Looking forward to your insights on the recommended best practice.

SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database SAP BTP, ABAP environment

entry.title: Unable to set a connection from SAP Analytics Cloud to PostgreSQL 17 through JDBC Driver
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community, 

we are currently not able to set a connection in import from PostgreSQL 17 Database to SAC. In the official documentation seems that only version until 13 is currently supported. Is there any workaround to handle it?

SAP Analytics Cloud PostgreSQL on SAP BTP, hyperscaler option

entry.title: Re: Get started with the ABAP custom code migration process
entry.content:
Hello @Ben,

thank you for your feedback. Regarding your example on the screenshot: following the scoping rules in the Custom Code Migration app, the INCLUDE program should be in scope, since it is statically referenced by the program which is in scope by usage data. The situation with User-Exits and BAdIs in your system must be clarified. Please create a ticket to the component BC-DWB-CEX-CCM, describing also an example of active User-Exits and BAdIs that are set to "Not in Scope".

Custom Code Migration app has been actively used in many custom code migration projects as well externally as internally by SAP service organization, but we have never got any requirement for downloading the complete scope. Could you please explain your need. Currently the list of packages can be exported to the Excel (with state "In Scope"/"Not in Scope"). Could you also please explain your requirement about tracking the packages which are already checked? Any project created in the Custom Code Migration app analyzes either the whole custom code in the system, or selected packages (provided under "Advanced Configuration"). Correspondingly you get analysis results always either for all custom code or selected packages, no intermediate analysis by "packages which are already checked".

Thank you!

Kind Regards,
Olga.

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 how to filter at column level
entry.content: Thanks for the help. I am using oData v2. Do you have any example of how to use formatter or a expression binding on the column itself to transform it in 1:1 relantionship?

entry.title: We are querying SuccessFactors Comp API with periodDelta Mode and isNotFirstQuery
entry.content:
Has anyone done this from CPI and if so where do you set the value of the value of "isNotFirstQuery" to "true" or false.

As the documentation says we just add resultOptions=isNotFirstQuery, my question is where does it get a value of true/false.

 

Regards

RI

entry.title: Re: To track the Transport Request & Creation Date of a Plant
entry.content: This is really helpful. Thank you so much

entry.title: Re: How to create a RAP BO to change the content of a customizing table in the production client
entry.content:
Hi @thomasmakkink 

the BC Maintenance Object Wizard uses a singleton pattern for the generated RAP BO for two reasons:

  • The singleton entity stores the selected transport request virtually for all changes.
  • allows inline editing for the main table as this is only possible in the FE object page.

For an app without transport, the first point is obsolete. Now, it depends on how much you like inline editing as a function compared to the function that a list report provides, such as the availability of selection fields.
The Custom Business Configurations app, or rather the SMBC object, also supports RAP BO without singleton pattern, so the result of the other wizards is fine.

You are right that the other ADT wizards do not use the singleton pattern. Therefore, if you really want to create a singleton pattern RAP BO for an A table with the help of a ADT wizard, you can temporarily change the delivery class to C, use the BC Wizard with the option "No Transport", clean up the RAP BO from everything transport object related, delete the transport object, and finally reset the delivery class to A. Not very straightforward either.

entry.title: Accept/Revoke MRP Run results in the Stock/Requirements List and MRP Fiori Apps
entry.content:
MRP Lists are part of the SAP S/4HANA compatibility scope, which means that customers will lose usage rights for MRP Lists transactions and tables. SAP recommends companies should start using either the Stock/Requirements List or the MRP Cockpit Fiori apps to evaluate the MRP results, as I mentioned in my blog MRP Lists are gone with MRP Live! What should I do now?. However, users were still missing some of the old MRP List functionalities. 

When comparing the old MRP List transactions with the Stock/Requirements List or the MRP Fiori apps, most MRP planners missed a processing indicator that can highlight which materials had already been processed after the MRP run.

To fill this GAP, SAP introduced a new feature to accept or revoke MRP Run result in transactions MD04 / MD07 and the MRP Cockpit Fiori apps, as described in SAP Note 3576000. Let’s understand how this new feature works.

 

Accept MRP Results in the Fiori Apps

When we access the new Fiori App Monitor Material Coverage (F0247), we can add thew new column MRP Result Accepted to the materials list, along with the corresponding filter in the header, as we can see in Figure 1.

Figure 1: MRP Result Acceptance in the Monitor Material Coverage app

 

When accessing a material for the first time after it has been planned by MRP, will have the value Not Accepted, because the MRP result was not yet evaluated by the planner. As we can see in Figure 1, the MRP Results were not accepted for most materials, with the exception of material RM16.

When selecting materials to be managed and navigating to the app Manage Material Coverage (F0251), we will see the new button Accept MRP Result in the lower-right corner, as highlighted in the Figure 2.  

Figure 2: MRP Result Acceptance in the Manage Material Coverage app

 

Once this button is clicked, the value of MRP Result Accepted will be changed to Accepted in Monitor MRP Coverage. We can then filter out materials for which the MRP result has been already accepted, allowing planners to focus on those still pending evaluation.

The acceptance of MRP results can be manually revoked in app Manage Material Coverage app, or it will be automatically revoked whenever the material is planned again by MRP. Figure 3 shows that the button in the right-lower corner changed to Revoke MRP Result after the acceptance.

Figure 3: Revoke Acceptance of the MRP Result in the Manage Material Coverage app

 

Accept MRP Results in the Stock/Requirements List

The acceptance of the MRP results was not only introduced in the MRP Cockpit Fiori apps, but also in the SAP GUI transactions MD07 and MD04, so the MRP planner who is still using the classical transactions will also have the ability to accept and revoke the MRP results.

When launching the collective access of the Stock/Requirements List (transaction MD07), a new tab will be available under the Restrict Selection screen section. Here, users can choose to display all Stock/Requirements, only those for which the MRP results have been accepted, or only those for which the MRP results has not been accepted. Figure 4 highlights the new fields available on the selection screen of the Stock/Requirements List.

Figure 4: MRP Result Acceptance Status in the Stock/Requirements List.

 

When opening a material in the Stock/Requirements List, we will see the new button Accept MRP Result in the header menu, as shown in Figure 5.  

Figure 5: Accept MRP Result button in the Stock/Requirements List.

 

Once we accept the MRP results, the button changes to Revoke Acceptance, as shown in Figure 6.

Figure 6: Revoke Acceptance button in the Stock/Requirements List.

 

Implementing the “Accept/Revoke MRP Run results” feature

The feature to Accept/Revoke MRP results can be enabled in SAP S/4HANA 2023 with the implementation of the following notes:

No.

SAP Note

Description

1

3576000

SAP- Production Planning- New Feature to accept/revoke MRP Run result through MD07 and Manage material coverage Fiori Application

2

3583983

SAP- Production Planning- Accept/revoke MRP Run result in Monitor material coverage- Net & Individual segments Fiori Application (F2101A)

3

3583982

SAP- Production Planning- Accept/revoke MRP Run result in Monitor material coverage- Net segments (F0247A)

4

3583728

SAP- Production Planning- Accept/revoke MRP Run result in Manage material coverage Fiori Application (F0251A)

5

3582358

 

SAP- Production Planning- Accept/revoke MRP Run result in Manage material coverage Fiori Application (F0251)

6

3582655

SAP- Production Planning- Accept/revoke MRP Run result in MRP Cockpit Reuse Component Container application (F0844)

 

The implementation of these notes into the SAP S/4HANA system will bring changes into standard transactions, such as MD04 and MD07, and Fiori Apps like Manage Material Coverage and Monitor Material Coverage. These notes will also introduce the new table PPMRP_ACKNWLEDGE, where the indicator IS_PLN_RSLT_ACKNOWLEDGED is marked when the MRP Results are accepted.

With the introduction of the Accept/Revoke MRP Run Results feature, SAP continues to bridge the functional gaps between MRP List transactions, that are part of the compatibility scope, and the modern Fiori experience. This enhancement will allow MRP planners to manage their workload more effectively by clearly distinguishing evaluated from non-evaluated materials. 

 

Brought to you by the SAP S/4HANA Regional Implementation Group

entry.title: Re: Requested function ZTAB2 is not available here

entry.title: MLT goal rating that exceeds 5 point scale not displayed correctly in PM Form
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am having issues displaying actual MLT rating from Goal Plan to PM form when it exceeds 5 point scale. Instead of the actual rating, it is being adjusted to max rating which is 5. I attached a screenshot here for reference (rating is 8 but PM form rating displayed as 5). 

To give you a background of our setup, the PM form is using rating scale with 5 point scale and MLT in goal plan is also 1-5.  We're using custom calculation in goal plan so there will be instances that goal rating will exceed 5. The expectation is when MLT rating from goal plan is above 5 (e.g. 5.1, 5.2, 6, 8), the actual goal rating will still display in PM form as is (probably unshaded stars and no label).  

Can you please confirm if this is possible or we need to adjust the rating scale we're using in PM form to accommodate ratings above 5?

entry.title: Re: Not able to run MDK application through run as local...
entry.content:
Here is my Northwind BTP destination.  I created a new MDK application (List Detail template) using this as the source and was able to deploy and test as expected for the Web Client.

{
    "exportTime": "2025-05-05 16:17:17.107974972",
    "destination": {
        "Name": "Northwind",
        "Type": "HTTP",
        "URL": "https://services.odata.org/V2/Northwind/Northwind.svc",
        "Authentication": "NoAuthentication",
        "ProxyType": "Internet",
        "HTML5.DynamicDestination": "true",
        "Description": "northwind odata",
        "MobileEnabled": "true",
        "WebIDEEnabled": "true",
        "WebIDEUsage": "odata_gen"
    }
}

entry.title: Machine Translation On-the-Fly: Removing the Language Barrier
entry.content:
Have you ever had difficulties reading non-translated SAP documentation? Or that you don’t fully understand the text? 

The age of AI is officially here! This time, it’s revolutionizing how we consume knowledge. We’re taking an important step towards tearing down the language wall and globalizing our vast knowledge database, the Help Portal. With the assistance of AI technology, SAP's standard English documentation can now be instantly translated to over 39 languages. 

How to use it 

Follow the next steps to translate any topic: 

  1. Open the desired SAP Fieldglass topic on the Help Portal 
  2. Hover the mouse right next to the title to see the selected language 
  3. Click the arrow to open the available Languages drop-down menu 
  4. Select the desired language 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Your way is only one click away! 

Up to this point, SAP Fieldglass Help Portal pages had additional language translations only on the What's New Viewer content, while limited translations to German, Japanese, and occasionally Spanish and Portuguese were available solely for user guides.  

The Machine Translation On-the-Fly allows instant translation in 40 languages for all SAP Fieldglass Help Portal content, enhancing your experience as you can now choose your preferred language. 

 

Disclaimer: Keep in mind that this is an AI automatic translation tool based on the English Language. Be cautious with the translated content as it may not be perfect. When in doubt, consult the original English text.

entry.content: Great post! Very informative 🙂

entry.title: Re: Implementation Tips - SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, inbound invoicing option for Brazil
entry.content: very good documentation!

entry.title: Guide to Generate PGP Public Key & Secret key for SAP CPI
entry.content:
To ensure compatibility with SAP CPI, here's how to generate PGP keys without using the AEAD algorithm.

1) Generate Public and Secret Keys

Step 1: Verify GnuPG installation.

  • Run “gpg –version”.

 

  • If not installed:
    • Windows: Download and install Gpg4win.
    • Linux: sudo apt-get update

sudo apt-get install gnupg

    • Mac: brew install gnupg

Step 2: Generate a PGP key pair.

  • Run: “gpg --full-generate-key”

When prompted, provide:

 

 

  • Key type: Choose option 1 (RSA and RSA).
  • Key size: 2048.
  • Validity period: For example, 2y (years), 9m (months), or 3w (weeks).
  • User ID details: Enter a unique name and email recognized by SAP CPI.
  • Passphrase: Create and securely store it (needed later).

 

 

Step 3: Export the public key.

“gpg --armor --export your.email@example.com > public_key.asc”

(For instance: gpg --armor --export sapcpi@gmail.com > public_key.asc)

 

  • Save the resulting file locally.

 

Step 4: Export the private (secret) key.

“gpg --armor --export-secret-keys your.email@example.com > private_key.asc”

(For instance: gpg --armor --export-secret-keys sapcpi@gmail.com > private_key.asc)

  • Enter your passphrase when prompted. The private key will be saved locally.

 

Step 5: Check if the generated key has AEAD_ALGORITHM.

 

  • If yes, run: “setpref AES256 AES192 AES128 3DES SHA512 SHA384 SHA256 SHA224 SHA1 ZLIB BZIP2 ZIP Uncompressed”

 

  • Otherwise, you can skip this step.

Step 6: (If needed) Repeat Step 3 and Step 4 to save updated public and private keys.

2) Configure the Generated Keys in SAP CPI

  • Log in to SAP CPI and navigate to Monitor => PGP Keys.

 

  • To encrypt messages, deploy the public key under "Manage PGP Keys".

 

 

Click on Add.

 

 

  • To decrypt messages, deploy the secret key and provide the passphrase in "Manage PGP Keys".

 

 

Click on Add,

 

 

  • Finally, create or update your interface to include the required encryption or decryption steps.

entry.title: Email Output in S/4 HANA Cloud from Freight order
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to send "waybill" attached  as PDF through an email to carrier from Freight order. I think this can be done through config without any ABAP development. But I find the below two issues.

I cannot see the object 'Freight order" in the below config,

Secondly in  Output parameter determination" app, "Waybill" is enabled for "Print " in below decision table. But when i add another row for waybill for medium=email, system gives error. Iam not sure why. System should allow since waybill can be sent through email or a user can take a print. So both options should be available in below decision table. Can someone suggest it it is system issue or Iam doing something wrong ?

rgds

sar

entry.title: Re: End-to-end Testing using Peppol Exchange in SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, Cloud Edition
entry.content: @Uwe_K - that is what I expected that sender can see but receiver just gets the invoice versus it showing in monitor.  I'm seeing our VAT code in SML on helger.com site using our VAT id (participants) but had a supplier tell us on Friday they couldn't send a Peppol invoice to us from their system.  A "test" versus production item in the Communication Arrangement PEPPOL Send Invoice Outbound Service in QA test environment has Test on the end >>  hana.ondemand.com:443/cxf/PeppolSendDocumentTest  Should it?  We're trying to send invoices to Productive Concur from S4HC test because these invoices can be easily intercepted in Concur invoice, but I'm wondering if this Test URL in Communication Arrangements routes to Peppol SMK, while telling us the format is OK, it's been pushed, etc. to some invisible end point.  Related, we can't configure both Concur Production and Concur test (UAT) environment with Participant ids concurrently.  I saw similar issue in Doc Compliance/Peppol participants where I entered participants in Development Cloud foundry tenant followed by Production cloud foundry tenant.  It would throw an error, but then accept the participant info.  Checking the other CF tenant, the participant details were deleted. Or it only likes one active set of participants.

Thanks and regards

Florin

entry.title: Legal Entity Rationalization: A New Strategy Through Early IT Integration
entry.content:
Legal Entity Simplification (LES) or Rationalization (LER) is a strategy that large companies use to improve their efficiency, reduce operational costs, and gain tax benefits by reorganizing their legal structures. As large companies grow through mergers and acquisitions (M&A), their legal structures often become complex and costly to manage. Each newly acquired business usually remains a separate legal entity, which can lead to inefficiencies in operations, compliance, reporting, and tax management.

To solve this, companies undertake Legal Entity Simplification (LES) or Legal Entity Rationalization (LER). This process involves consolidating multiple legal entities into fewer.

This process helps reduce administrative costs, improve overall operations, and create a more agile and cost-effective business model.

A Legal Entity rationalization can be understood from the below example:  

XYZ Holding AG is a Swiss Entity and has operations in France. It has 5 legal entities in France and below is the holding/subsidiary relationship among the LE:

The below are the two simplified legal entity structures between XYZ and its subsidiaries.

Option 1:  A desired simplified structure, All LEs are fully merged into 1 existing LE. Legal Entity BCD SAS,

BCDE SAS, and CDE SAS are fully merged operationally into ABC SAS.

Option 2: A relatively simplified structure by reducing the number of LEs. Legal Entity ABC SAS and BCDE SAS are fully merged operationally into BCD SAS.

 

Why Legal Entity Simplification Matters: Key Benefits

Simplifying a company’s legal structure delivers measurable business benefits:

  1. Lower Administrative Costs: Reducing the number of entities cuts down on redundant processes across finance, HR, and IT.
  2. Greater Operational Efficiency: With fewer entities, it becomes easier to consolidate teams, negotiate better contracts, and streamline operations.
  3. Tax Optimization: Loss-making entities can be merged or restructured to unlock valuable tax offsets.
  4. Improved Compliance and Risk Management: A leaner structure reduces regulatory complexity and enhances governance oversight.
  5. Resource Optimization: Functions like production, marketing, and logistics benefit from better allocation and reduced redundancy.
  6. Strategic Flexibility: Simplified organizations are better positioned to absorb new acquisitions or pivot in response to market shifts.

Key Factors to consider for restructuring:

There are various factors impact the organization's Legal entity restructuring. The most common evaluation criteria are listed below:

  1. Human Capital Management: Review employee contracts, manage layoffs or transitions, and align salaries to ensure a smooth workforce integration.
  2. Tax Planning and Compliance: Assess risks like loss of tax benefits, transfer of tax losses, and potential changes in tax brackets after restructuring.
  3. Operational Viability: Check whether the entities’ business models, brands, and market positions align well to ensure smooth operations post-merger.
  4. Large vs. Small Entities: Smaller entities are usually merged into larger ones; compatibility in operations and business models is key.
  5. Intellectual Property (IP): Ensure patents and IP rights can be transferred without legal hurdles or loss of competitive advantage.
  6. Vendor Contracts: Review whether vendor contracts can be transferred without renegotiation and explore cost-saving opportunities.
  7. Customer Contracts: Verify if customer contracts, especially government deals, can be moved without impacting service or relationships.

 LES/LER Approaches used by accounting firms:

The approaches used by accounting firms to assess and simplify an organization's legal structure are below:

Dormant First: This approach focuses on eliminating dormant or inactive entities, allowing for a swift transition. It is a simplified form of LES that requires minimal effort and few changes to existing business operations. In some cases, organizations adopt this strategy by having the acquiring LE gradually merge the operations of the acquired entity into their existing structure. However, this method typically does not result in significant cost savings.

Outside In: This is the most commonly used approach. It involves reviewing the entire organizational structure and simplifying it to create a more streamlined framework. Some entities remain intact, while others are merged operationally to optimize the organization’s structure.

Straw Method: The newest approach, the Straw Method, disregards existing entities and creates an entirely new organizational structure. New entities are established, and all existing entities are operationally merged into this fresh framework.

 Traditional methodology for Restructuring:

The traditional approach to Legal Entity Simplification is a three-phase process from start to end.

  • Phase I focuses exclusively on the Accounting firm, aiming to understand, design, and finalize the restructuring. Steps 1 to 6 below are part of Phase I.
  • Phase II is dedicated to the IT team, who will build the system based on the finalized design. Steps 7 to 11 below are part of Phase II.
  • Phase III marks the go-live phase, where IT will manage the cutover and prepare the system for the new legal entity structure, while the Accounting firm handles the legal and operational aspects. Below step 12 is part of Phase III.
  • Phases I and II are separate, with minimal interaction between the IT team and the Accounting firm. Below is a summary of the current methodology:

Challenges with the Existing Approach

While the above process outlines the necessary steps for LES, it also presents several challenges, particularly when IT is involved too late:

  1. Late Entry (Feasibility Study): Introducing IT late in the process limits its ability to identify technical limitations or integration issues early on. This can delay the project, increase complexity, and create potential failures.
  2. Duplicate Effort: When IT joins the project later, tasks such as workshops, planning, and contract management may need to be revisited, leading to wasted effort and increased costs.
  3. Higher Costs: Late IT involvement often results in higher rework costs, additional resources, and system modifications, which could have been avoided by involving IT from the start.
  4. Risk of Failure: If IT is not fully integrated early on, integration challenges or system compatibility issues may jeopardize the entire project, causing delays, operational disruption, or legal non-compliance.

 A Revised Methodology for Restructuring: Early IT Integration

To overcome these challenges, a new approach is proposed where IT is integrated into the LES process from the beginning. Below are the steps of the revised methodology:

  • Phase I is dedicated solely to the accounting firm, focusing on understanding the current state (AS-IS), setting objectives, and completing due diligence. Steps 1 to 3 below fall under Phase I.
  • Phase II is a shared responsibility. The accounting firm is in charge of the initial proposal, while the IT firm is responsible for conducting a feasibility study of the proposals. Both teams, alongside business and leadership, evaluate the proposals, select the final option, and set a target date. Steps 4 to 6 below are part of Phase II.
  • Phase III is dedicated entirely to the IT team, who will design and build the system based on the finalized design. Below steps 7 to 9 belong to Phase III.
  • Phase IV is the go-live phase, where the IT team will complete the cutover and prepare the system for the new legal entity structure, while the accounting firm will manage the legal and operational aspects of the go-live. Step 10 below is part of Phase IV.

Phase I and Phase III are mutually exclusive, with minimal interaction between the IT team and the accounting firm. However, Phases II and IV involve joint execution by both teams.

Case Study: A leading Agrochemical

I applied this method at a leading agrochemical firm with operations in 15+ countries. By involving IT early:

  • Each LES project saved around 1 month of time
  • Saved $1.2 to $2 million per project in IT resources
  • If applied across five projects, total savings could reach $6 to $10 million

This new model has since been adopted across regions and proved to be highly scalable.

Read in Detail at Below Paper:

If you'd like to learn more about Legal Entity Rationalization (LER) or Legal Entity Simplification (LES) and the new methodology, I’ve written a detailed paper on the topic. You can read it using the link below.

Revolutionizing Legal Entity Rationalization – Full Paper

Conclusion

Legal Entity Simplification is a powerful strategy—but only when done right. Involving IT from the beginning makes a big difference. It helps companies:

  • Avoid delays
  • Lower costs
  • Improve accuracy
  • Deliver smoother transitions

If your organization is planning a legal entity restructuring, make sure your IT team is part of the conversation from day one.

entry.title: Re: Simple extensibility of Data Sources for Output Forms in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Great post

I have a similar scenario, but a little more complex: I need to extend a data source by a new node. For example the form of a Sales Order Quotation needs to be extended with the Bill of Materials list.

All I can find is extending a data source with a custom field.

Any idea if there is the option to extend it with a new node / table?


Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Generating work order expiration alerts and customizing the standard alert text in Employee Cent
entry.content:
Hi,

Has anyone tried doing something similar for elements in Job Information?   A use case that we're exploring is triggering an alert when a date field on job information for an employee (which may have been set months ago) is less than 30 days away.

thanks in advance,

Ricardo Rojas

entry.title: Re: How to create custom data source (Service) for forms in Public Cloud
entry.content: Great post I have a similar scenario, but a little more complex: I need to extend a data source by a new node. For example the form of a Sales Order Quotation needs to be extended with the Bill of Materials list. All I can find is extending a data source with a custom field. Any idea if there is the option to extend it with a new node / table? Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP PUBLIC CLOUD Recurring journal entry mass posting...
entry.content: Dear Alice, Could you please confirm if SAP FI Public Cloud supports mass uploading of recurring journal entries? If available, I would appreciate guidance on: The correct app/tile to use for bulk recurring entries Required template format (Excel/CSV) Key fields needed (frequency, document type, etc.) This would help me automate recurring postings more efficiently. Thank you for your assistance. Best regards, Kunkumasudharshan R

entry.title: Data access class is empty in BOBF-Node, based on CDS-Interface view
entry.content:
Hi all,

we have two 750-Systems with same patch level 27; 

one System is ERP-System, if you create on this system CDS-Interface-View then BOPF-Object will be generated automatically and in Node-Overview you can see, that "Data Access class" /BOBF/CL_DAC_LEGACY_TABLE was set as default automatically

second system is the QIM-System (Quality-Issue-Management System); if you try same with creation of CDS-Interface-View with same annotations like on CDS-Interface-View on ERP-System, BOPF-Object will be generated automatically too but the "Data Access Class" is empty and also disabled, so you cannot add "data access class" 

Maybe do someone knows the reason?

BR

entry.title: Re: Introducing UI5 linter
entry.content:
@FlorianVogt 

Thanks for your inputs.

Do you plan to integrate this oit of the box with SAP continuous integration and delivery? If not, how could integrate this into our pipeline?

Thanks!

C.

entry.title: Re: New READ TABLE Syntax Results in SY-SUBRC = 4 – Why Is It Not Recognized?
entry.content: It's named Table Expression. As you can see in the ABAP Keyword Documentation, sy-subrc is not modified by a Table Expression. Your assumption is incorrect. Do your test again.

entry.title: Re: How To Set Up a Custom MIME Header for your Email Server
entry.content:
Hello @loganathan_p3 

O365 seems to not allow this configuration. Please see this Microsoft thread, under Comments, where the Microsoft team has answered it;

https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/answers/questions/2148002/how-to-add-custom-mime-header-in-email-in-exchange

entry.title: Request for Dataset or Query to Report "Started" Status for Online Items in PRD- LMS Custom Report
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I am looking to enhance our PRD reporting by identifying learners who have "started" but not completed online training items. While the "Online Item Status" report exists, extracting the "Started" status requires to send E-mails for users who have started the course.

Could you please advise if there's:

An existing dataset or standard report that directly displays the "Started" status?

If not, what tables/fields or query code can be added to PRD to fetch this information?

Thanks...!

entry.title: Re: HTTP Client is not connceted in S/4HANA 1909
entry.content: It does not sound like anything major. Your best bet would be to involve SAP Services. Please contact your SAP Account Executive or Service Account Manager if no one adds a solution to this thread.

  • acw784081 – 100 € kuponkeja uusille tileille T𝐞𝐦u-sovelluksessa

  • acw784081 – Vähintään 20 € ostoksista 30 % alennus (maksimissaan 24 €)

  • acw784081 – Ilmainen toimitus kaikkialle Suomeen

  • acw784081 – 0 € lahjatuote uusille käyttäjille

  • acw784081 – Eksklusiiviset tarjoukset T𝐞𝐦un kampanjasivun kautta

Miten lunastat T𝐞𝐦un 100 € alennuskoodin?

  1. Avaa T𝐞𝐦u-sovellus tai verkkosivusto

  2. Rekisteröidy uutena käyttäjänä tai kirjaudu sisään

  3. Lisää tuotteita ostoskoriin ja siirry kassalle

  4. Syötä koodi acw784081 kupongin kohtaan

  5. Vahvista alennus ja suorita tilaus – nauti säästöistäsi!

acw784081 – Etuja myös nykyisille asiakkaille

  • Jopa 100 € lisäalennuksia

  • 30 % alennus jo alennetuista tuotteista

  • Ilmainen express-toimitus ja bonuksia

  • Toistuvat kuponkiedut

Älä missaa tätä tarjousta – käytä koodia acw784081 ja säästä jopa 100 € + 30 % heti T𝐞𝐦ussa!

entry.title: TE𝓜U код за отстъпка: "acw784081" - TE𝓜U промоционален код
entry.content:
Какво представлява референтният код на Te𝔪u?

Te𝔪u реферален код дефинира уникален линк, който предоставя 30% отстъпка за поръчки, направени при регистрация с този линк https://te𝔪u.to/m/u9fu1v7mn0z, пакет купон от 180 лв. и продукти със специална оферта за нови потребители на приложението. Използвайте код acw784081 при регистрация или поръчка!

entry.title: Re: Can LMS have separate Login ??
entry.content: @BijuG, the SAP SuccessFactors Learning and SAP Cloud Identity Services Integration Overview guide has details to assist with the implementation of Learning and IAS for users who only use Learning. They don't exist in BizX/Platform. If users exist in BizX/Platform, then it's not possible to separate the login. They access the system via BizX/Platform, then go to Learning.

entry.title: TE𝓜U ڈسکاؤنٹ کوڈ: "acw784081" - TE𝓜U پروموشن کوڈ
entry.content:
Te𝔪u ریفرنس کوڈ کیا ہے؟


Te𝔪u ریفرل کوڈ ایک منفرد لنک کی وضاحت کرتا ہے جو اس لنک کے ساتھ رجسٹر ہونے پر دیئے گئے آرڈرز پر 30% رعایت فراہم کرتا ہے https://te𝔪u.to/m/u9fu1v7mn0z، ایک 180 лв کوپن پیکج اور نئے ایپلیکیشن صارفین کے لیے خصوصی پیشکش کی مصنوعات۔ رجسٹریشن یا آرڈر کرتے وقت acw784081 کوڈ استعمال کریں!

entry.title: Re: Personas MM Flavors script errors
entry.content:
"Upgraded our system" is a vague statement. What exactly was upgraded?

Depending on this, the underlying screens of the backend transaction may have changed and that's the most probable reason for the script error. Also, the webgui theme may be different after an upgrade, which results in changes in menu structure.

You will need to adjust your flavor(s) / script(s) accordingly. Actually, the second screen shot in your post tells you how to change the related script in that case, but you can expect other similar problems if the screen layout was altered by the upgrade.

Novos usuários do aplicativo Tеmu podem desbloquear um pacote de cupons no valor de R$300 e ainda obter 30% de desconto na primeira compra ao usar o código “acw784081”. É uma oportunidade imperdível para quem está começando a comprar na plataforma.

entry.title: Login credentials for WalkMe Editor for Getting Started with Building WalkMe Solutions.
entry.content:
Can you please confirm the login credentials for WalkMe Editor for the WalkMe Digital Adoption Consultant training / certification?  In the 2nd pre-training in the 2nd session (Setting Up a Unique User Identifier) you provide a link to download the Editor for WalkMe.  This does not work and takes you to a login page and past the download as shown in the screening.  This appears to be required for Building access and accessing several resources.  

Credentials to Klawsign.com were provided in 3rd session (Exploring WalkMe Apps).  However, this appears to be limited.   Can someone please clarify?  Thank you.

 

Getting Started with Building WalkMe Solutions.

entry.title: Sapphire Orlando 2025: Explore business scenarios enabled by SAP BTP that you can implement today
entry.content:
Hello, SAP Community!

My name is Joanne Koh-Stewart, and I am Director of Product Marketing for SAP BTP for Business Applications and Core. I focus on identifying and nurturing SAP BTP use cases that solve real customer challenges across the Business Suite and lines of business. You might have seen my name around Sapphire and TechEd times, writing about our SAP BTP use cases.

I'm pleased to announce that I'll be presenting again at this year's Sapphire Orlando. My session Explore business scenarios enabled by SAP BTP that you can implement today with my colleague @denisema, is scheduled for Tuesday, May 20th at 11:30am – 11:50am EDT.

 

What you will learn about:

This session is particularly exciting because it allows me to share insights gained from our customers and partners who leveraged SAP BTP. The idea for this session emerged from numerous conversations with customers eager to understand what they could do with SAP BTP and how they could quickly implement it to address their pressing business challenges. We've curated a selection of use cases that demonstrate tangible value and can be rapidly deployed.  

For customers who want to try out SAP BTP but are not ready to commit, this session will dive into how customers have different options to get started for free with SAP BTP.

 

We look forward to seeing you:

Whether you're well-versed in SAP BTP or just beginning to explore its potential, this session promises valuable takeaways on business challenges that SAP BTP can help resolve. Denise and I look forward to meeting you at the session or at the BTP for Business Application booth at Sapphire Orlando, and engaging in insightful discussions about the transformative power of SAP BTP and how it can address your specific business needs. Make sure to add Explore business scenarios enabled by SAP BTP that you can implement today session to your Favourites to add it to your Sapphire agenda. 

 

Other related sessions I recommend:  

Mission possible: Accelerate transformation with SAP Discovery Center - BTP2467 

Related community managed tags you should subscribe to remain informed about this topic: 

  • SAP Business Technology Platform
  • SAP Build
  • SAP Business Suite
  • SAP Integration Suite

Related community topic pages: 

  •  SAP Business Technology Platform In Action

 

Now let's hear from you:

  • How are you currently driving digital transformation within your organization?
  • What are your main goals for using SAP BTP?
  • What are/were your biggest challenges in getting started with SAP BTP?

Tell us in the comments, and we look forward to seeing you virtual and/or in Orlando in a few weeks!

entry.title: «acw784081» կտրոնի կոդը՝ 40,000 ֏ նվեր փաթեթ նոր օգտատերերի համար Tе𝗺u-ում
entry.content:
Եթե նոր եք Tе𝗺u-ում, ապա կարող եք ստանալ մինչև 40,000 ֏ արժողությամբ կտրոնների փաթեթ, ինչպես նաև 30% զեղչ ձեր առաջին պատվերի համար՝ օգտագործելով կոդը «acw784081»։ Առաջարկը գործում է սահմանափակ ժամանակով՝ գրանցումից հետո 1 ժամվա ընթացքում։

Ակտիվացրեք առաջարկը այստեղ՝
https://tе𝗺u.to/k/eg5fn96vwh1

Նոր օգտատերերի առավելությունները՝

  • Մինչև 40,000 ֏ արժողությամբ կտրոններ

  • 30% զեղչ՝ 8,000 ֏ և ավել պատվերների դեպքում (մաքս. զեղչ՝ 9,000 ֏)

  • Նվեր ապրանք (0 ֏ արժեքով)

  • Հատուկ զեղչեր՝ հասանելի անձնական հրավերի հղումով

Ինչպես օգտագործել “acw784081” կոդը՝

  1. Բացեք հղումը՝ https://tе𝗺u.to/k/eg5fn96vwh1

  2. Ներբեռնեք և բացեք Tе𝗺u հավելվածը

  3. Գրանցվեք որպես նոր օգտատեր

  4. Ընտրեք ապրանքները, և գնացեք վճարման էջ

  5. Մուտքագրեք «acw784081» կոդը կտրոնի դաշտում

  6. Վերցրեք զեղչը և ավարտեք պատվերը

entry.title: How to delete all glossary entries at once in Process Manager?
entry.content: I have a question: is it possible to delete glossary entries in Process Manager in bulk, instead of removing them one by one? Or is there a way to clear all glossary entries at once?

entry.title: Code promo “acw784081” – Pack de coupons de 100 € pour les nouveaux utilisateurs Tеmu
entry.content:
Vous êtes nouveau sur Tеmu ? Profitez dès maintenant d’un pack de coupons d’une valeur de 100 € et recevez 30 % de réduction sur votre première commande avec le code “acw784081”. Offre réservée aux nouveaux utilisateurs après leur première installation de l’application.

Ce que vous obtenez :

  • Un pack de coupons d’une valeur totale de 100 €

  • 30 % de réduction sur toute commande supérieure à 20 € (remise maximale : 24 €)

  • Un produit gratuit d’une valeur de 0 €

  • Accès à des offres exclusives via votre lien personnel

Comment utiliser le code “acw784081” sur Tеmu :

  1. Téléchargez et ouvrez l’application Tеmu

  2. Créez un nouveau compte

  3. Ajoutez vos articles au panier

  4. Saisissez le code “acw784081” dans le champ du coupon

  5. Vérifiez que la réduction est bien appliquée et finalisez votre commande

Conseil :
L’offre est valable pendant 1 heure après l’installation de l’application. Ne ratez pas cette opportunité d’économiser dès votre première commande.

entry.title: SAP GUI software for Windows 7 operating system
entry.content:
Is SAP GUI compatible with Windows 7?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI software for Windows 7 operating system
entry.content:
Hello,

All the supported platforms are listed on https://me.sap.com/notes/66971/E

Windows 7 has gone out of support by Microsoft, and it's not supported by SAP GUI also.

entry.content: I just escaped. It was a great challenge.

entry.title: Re: How to use nested $filter inside $expand while workin...
entry.content: Million thanks @Willem_Pardaens Both suggestion for where() clause worked. and here %7C is ASCII conversion for special character but CAP handles it automatically it seems. filterBuId='CZP1|2B'

entry.title: Re: SAPUI5 how to filter at column level
entry.content:
for example using a formatter:
<Text text="{path: 'to_Description', formatter: '.getEnglishDescription'}"

getEnglishDescription: function (descriptions) {
     for loop in descriptions.results until descriptions.results[i].Language === "EN" and return it
}

Thanks for your helps

Best regard !

entry.title: Re: Error when migrating PI/PO interface to Cloud Integration
entry.content: Does anyone got the solution to this issue?

entry.title: S4/HANA Readiness Check Issue
entry.content:
We ran the readiness check program in our ECC dev system with target S/4 version "SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition 2023 (03 (02/2025) FPS)". We uploaded the zip file in the SAP marketplace readiness check and when the data is loaded and we want to go inside the analysis we are getting the below warning. Not sure which SAP note it is referring here- Does it mean to update "SAP Note assistance" SNOTE?

We have detected that your SAP Note does not support Private Cloud Edition, and as a result, we cannot fully guarantee the accuracy of the current check results. In light of your particular scenario (conversion / upgrade), we strongly recommend that you upgrade to the latest SAP Notes version and perform the check again.

entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud - Authorization setting for separate...
entry.content:
Hi @yannichan ,

If I understand correctly, you find a standard app such as "Create Purchase Order" which can be used to change/create a PO. However, you want a similar app as only displaying the PO, such as "Display Purchase Order".

Not all "Create" apps have their siblings of "Display" apps. 

To control the access to the data, you can use the Restrictions to display the data only even in the "Create" app. You can find details in my blog https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-sap/using-restrictions-to-enhance-user-authorizations-in-the-sap-s-4hana-cloud/ba-p/13575978. 

Regards,

George

entry.title: WFA on HANA supervisior dimension older configuration overrides new config
entry.content:
Hello,

I have A WFA on HANA configuration issue.

I've been trying to change the configuration for supervisor dimension because even though the build was successful and running in TEST, I was running into errors if I click on supervisor dimension in WFA landing page in prod (despite the process load being successful, it was also failing to sync if I enable RBP). It couldn't be expanded or reported by etc.. The initial dimension was using the default SQL to build the hierarchy. I assumed there is some manager cyclic issue and since this is a new client in SF, their orginal hire data load hire record had NO_MANAGER in manager id and then the goLive records after had proper manager id. I initially assumed it would work regardless because the supervisor hierarchy was being created based on latest record so manager id would be there for all records except CEO and it was working in TEST.

Anyways, I deleted the older supervisor dimension and created new analysis dimension instead called it supervisiorv2 and put in SQL below just as a test to see if that works. I've also tried various SQL that excluded data from dates before certain date or exclude certain events or even creating a dummy mapping for all employees except CEO that have no manager id or simply just selecting the manager id into a dimension etc..

all were successful in process load except I could never expand the supervisor dimension or any manager Id related dimension no matter how simple the SQL is. Note the default SQL is fully functional in TEST instance but not in prod. An example is below SQL is successful when I run initial load process.

SELECT DISTINCT
    J.MANAGER_ID,
    CASE 
        WHEN J.MANAGER_ID = 'NO_MANAGER' THEN 'NO MANAGER'
        ELSE IFNULL(P.FIRST_NAME, '') || ' ' || IFNULL(P.LAST_NAME, '')
    END AS MANAGER_NAME
FROM "[%ODS_DATABASE%]"."EMP_JOB_INFO_T" J
LEFT JOIN "[%ODS_DATABASE%]"."EMP_EMPLOYMENT_INFO" E
    ON J.MANAGER_ID = E.USERS_SYS_ID
LEFT JOIN "[%ODS_DATABASE%]"."EMP_PERSONAL_INFO_T" P
    ON E.PERSON_ID = P.PERSON_ID

But then in edit hierarchies, the newer dimension(i add only one dimension in each run and remove others as tests) its still loading the older hierarchy based SQL into the new dimension. Also, the old structural supervisor dimension seems to have remained in the config cache or something as I still see it in edit hierarchies and  if expand on it I see the proper manager hierarchy that fails to expand in landing page.

Point is, it seems like the older initial SQL supervisor hierarchy is staying no matter how many times I run process initial load even if:

1- I remove supervisor dimension and run it after, it stays as picture below/above

2- if I add new supervisor dimension with different SQL or even different type(structural/analysis), it shows the older SQL hierarchy instead of the new SQL and then fails in landing page or even freezes if I try to edit it in edit hierarchies(if i choose manual option in SQL).

Is there a way to clear the old supervisor dimension config ? it seems to be stuck and any dimension I create based on manager id loads older structural dimension ? I have no errors in initial load processes, but if you would like me to share a load with SQL example above or default SQL hierarchy supervisor, let me know.

Thank you,

entry.title: Deletion Flag update in Pricing Records while creation is not show in the Change log report...
entry.content:
Hi Team, 

Customer does update the deletion flag while the condition record creation just inorder to supress the already existing record... 

We can't see this deletion flag in the Change Log report stating deletion flag is updated. 

Is there any solution around it?

entry.title: Re: clearing foreign currency payments on MT940 using OCM...
entry.content: I would try setting the g/l clearing account currency to GBP. It enables posting in GBP and EUR. If the currency of the g/l account is not local it is allowed to post only in that currency.

entry.title: Can we configure Production Process in DM integration workflow XSLT
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

Is it possible to configure Production Process in Workflow XSLT, operation activity in Routing, so that when we release an order, production process is set.

Thank In advance!

Regards,

Anvesh

entry.title: Re: Error when migrating PI/PO interface to Cloud Integration
entry.content: Hi, I have raised ticket with SAP support and they confirmed that they are aware about this issue. It happens when there are XML/JSON conversion rules on sender adapter. The fix would be available in around 3 weeks. The fix would be available from 6.65.7 version of the product and above.

entry.title: Smq2 Post goods issue not allowed User Status SD, object VB
entry.content:
EP1 100

Warehouse number 4107

sqm2 error post goods issue not allowed User Status SD, object VB3000397228000020. 

We have unblocked the regulation, ZNFPA that was blocked previously. Sales order still show the user Status SD. While updating the user status to blank, but it revert back to user status SD on the Sales order 3000397228 and not able to chance the status to blank. We need to post the good issue in ECC.

I am experiencing the same error when activating an existing graphical view (Dimension). The view has been functioning properly and is utilized in multiple associations. Therefore, creating a new view is not a viable option for us. I am curious if this issue is related to SAP’s most recent update. We are currently using Version 2025.9.49 (build date 4/23/25).
I will submit a ticket to SAP.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community Escape House for May - ABAP Cloud
entry.content: Escaped aswell, this was a good challenge.

entry.title: Re: Can I assign more than one course at a time to a user...
entry.content:
Hi Lauren,

I would group the 50 Procurement courses into a single folder called Procurement Training, or something similar, and assign the content at that level, i.e. to the group object.  When the users then open the Learner View tab and click on the Procurement Training entry, they will see a list of the course objects.  They can then click one of them to start that object.

Alternatively, you could create a folder structure that groups courses by Role and then assign those folder objects to the relevant user groups.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Inner join with AND , OR and LIKE in where clause sel...
entry.content:
Dear Vieet,

Have you been able to solve the problem yet?
I've identified a problem in your code: in my opinion you're using incorrect nesting in the Where clause of the second Selectstatement.
I would rewrite the clause as follows:
where saknr = @LT_acdoca-gkont
and spras = 'E'
and (
txt50 like '%TDS%' or
txt50 like '%CASH DISCOUNT%' or
txt50 like '%GBI%' or
txt50 like '%CUF%'
).
It's possible that your last statement isn't working correctly either, because then skat~spras = 'E'probably only affects the first LIKE.
Try the following solution:
SELECT acdoca~rbukrs,
acdoca~gjahr,
acdoca~belnr,
acdoca~wsl,
acdoca~augbl,
acdoca~gkont,
skat~spras,
skat~saknr,
skat~txt50
INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_acdoca_skat)
FROM acdoca AS acdoca
INNER JOIN skat AS skat
ON skat~saknr = acdoca~gkont
FOR ALL ENTRIES IN @LT_bsad
WHERE acdoca~rbukrs = @LT_bsad-bukrs
AND acdoca~gjahr = @LT_bsad-gjahr
AND acdoca~augbl = @LT_bsad-augbl
AND acdoca~rldnr = '0L'
AND (
skat~txt50 LIKE '%TDS%' OR
skat~txt50 LIKE '%CASH DISCOUNT%' OR
skat~txt50 LIKE '%GBI%' OR
skat~txt50 LIKE '%CUF%'
)
AND skat~spras = 'E'.
I hope my thoughts will help you.

Best regards

Dennis

entry.title: Re: Cds parameter length getting doubled in PaPM
entry.content:
Dear Nagaraosunkara,

Unfortunately, since I don't know exactly what your CDS-View looks like, I can't say exactly what the problem is.
To me, the problem points to an inconsistent interpretation between CDS-View and PaPM.
Could you please post a code snippet of your CDS-View, so I can take a closer look?
Which parameter length annotation in CDS-View did you use to define the length, the following @Consumption.parameter.length?

Best regards

Dennis

entry.title: Extract ECC
entry.content:
We have a requirement to extract the data from SAP ECC , which involves multiple tables involved in it around 10 tables and also involve loop logic from one table to another. What is the best approach to perform this ?

Is there any other way beyond ABAP program? I mean can we write SQL without installing any other tool?

Note : Client doesn't allow any external tools like BODS and all. Because they are going to decommission SAP soon .

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Public Cloud, what is the solution/process fo...
entry.content:
Hello @Dhabir 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition has no standard excise duty calculation and reporting functionality, such as those required for UK spirits manufacturers managing bonded and unbonded stock. To achieve compliance with HMRC regulations, consider the following approaches:

  • SAP Document and Reporting Compliance (DRC): While DRC supports VAT reporting and Making Tax Digital (MTD) submissions to HMRC, it does not cover excise duties.
    • Custom Extensions via SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP): Develop custom applications or extensions using SAP BTP to manage excise duty calculations and reporting. This approach facilitates integration with external systems and customisation to meet specific regulatory requirements.
    Apply to Supply
    • Third-Party Tax Compliance Solutions: Integrate with certified third-party solutions that specialise in excise duty management and HMRC compliance. These solutions can connect to SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition via APIs or SAP BTP.

Visit this below SAP Link SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, excise tax management by Vistex 

https://www.sap.com/uk/products/financial-management/excise-tax-management.html?

It's important to note that SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition offers more extensive capabilities, including support for excise tax management through solutions like Vistex. However, since your focus is on the Public Edition, the above approaches are recommended

Fell free to reach out for further assistance

With kind regards

Chuma

entry.title: Re: Personas MM Flavors script errors
entry.content: Thank you so much for getting back to me. We upgraded Personas to 3.0 SP 19. I tried doing the same thing in the second screen but it did not fix the error.

entry.title: How do I report on Alternative Cost Distribution in Table/Canvas report?
Re: OLAP Processing Error
entry.content:
Hi @DariusSoreata - based on what appear in the error log, it looks like you have a field setup as numeric or decimal but the value stored in that field is actually String value so the tool cannot convert the String value to numeric/decimal.

I don't know which field as it is not mentioned in the log but it looks like field related to User ID.  You will need to troubleshoot this yourselves in the configuration.

entry.title: Re: WFA Starter Packages Not Loading with No import logs...
entry.content:
Hi @sfsapsvsv - there is a known issue with the import somehow it does not refresh the page.  But if you open a new tab and check the load status for the import status, it usually gets imported successfully.

Also, you can also go to the Tables and Columns in the Data Factory configuration to check if there is fact table listed there or not.  If available, that means the template configuration has been imported successfully.  You still need to run initial load manually though.

entry.title: Re: Best Practices for Onboarding and MiniEC – With a Focus on Offboarding and Crossboarding
entry.content:

Do we need to activate Position Management for Mini Master with Full EC? 

For Functional only, is Position Management offered or this will be maintained as a custom field in Job info?

Thank you

entry.title: I am new in SAP, and need to run MD02_InHouseMaterialPlannedOrde,How to do this?
TreeTable - Retain Selection on collapse and expand
entry.content:
For one of our requirement, we are using sap.ui.table.TreeTable to show the hierarchical data. There is an option to select multiple lines and it is working. However, when a Node is collapsed and expanded again, all the previous selections are not visible. Is there any way to retain the selections ?

 

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: TreeTable - Retain Selection on collapse and expand
entry.content: Please check this KBA 2886097 - Collapse / expand / search / filter do not retain index state

entry.title: Comments box visible in recruitment dashboard
entry.content:
Hey, just wondering if there is a way to have a requisition comments box visible in the recruitment dashboard. We find the recruiters are using an excel spreadsheet to have visibility of all their reqs in one screen at quick glance. In SF they have to go into each req to see req notes. 

SAP SuccessFactors Platform  SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: WFA on HANA supervisior dimension older configuration...
entry.content: Hi @Abed - when you delete the supervisor hierarchy dimension, it will stay in the "Branches" table and cannot be clear out.  However, it should not affect the site if you ran WFA artifact sync after deleting the hierarchy dimension.  This hierarchy should be gone from the WFA site.

entry.title: Re: Report for Paying Failed invoices
entry.content: We were also looking for such reports, but did not find any. The only option is to manually check the individual invoices.

entry.title: Re: Issue with SAP Yard Logistics: Visual Business Screen...
entry.content:
Hi @Harshal92 ,

COLLADA (collaborative design activity) Set up -> find in that blog below and please check with SAP for more details.

Having issues to open Yard Cockpit application or Yard Layout Editor.


Sometimes when open Yard Cockpit application, an error shows up with "No map can be found". This is caused by the browser internet settings. SAP Note 2935088 provides the necessary setup to fix it.

How to draw Yard Layouts?


First there are a series of initial setup needed including color, visual object type and shape, etc. Visual Object Type represents the visual image of Storage bins or TUs in yard. The Visual Object Type will be assigned to packaging material type or storage bin type, which helps define the visual image of objects in yard. Each TUs belong to a specific packaging material type and each Storage bins has a storage bin type. Before drawing them, this setup is a prerequisite. For more detail guidance see SAP Note 3000428.

After all the setups are done you can go to Yard Layout Editor to draw the storage bin in yard. To reduce the effort of drawing a big yard, copying form an existing shape of storage bin can be possible. To make the graphical yard look trimmed, a template is provided for creating a list of storage bins.

Please be careful that all the storage bins can be drawn with shape regardless of the bin is empty or not. But only shape of empty bins can be deleted or changed. Once the storage bin is not empty anymore, the shape cannot be deleted or changed.

Credit: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-sap/answers-to-common-yard-logistics-questions/ba-p/13555230

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Personas MM Flavors script errors
entry.content:
I suspect that there may have been some other upgrade than just Personas to SP19. If the underlying screen or theme did not change, then upgrading the Personas SP alone should not have the described effect.

Did you perhaps also upgrade the SAP Basis, S/4HANA release or some other components as well?

entry.title: Re: In Public cloud getting error while updating the Juri...
entry.content:
Hi JP,

Could you send an incident to report the issue to the product support team?

Kind Regards,

Lucy
